transcript:
HCP: hello, whats wrong
Patient: knee hurts
HCP: where exactly
Patient: front of knee, below the kneecap
HCP: how long
Patient: started yesterday after gardening
HCP: any swelling
Patient: a little bit
HCP: lets check range of motion, extension feels tight
HCP: flexion okay, no locking
HCP: likely prepatellar bursitis or early effusion, ice it, ibuprofen 400mg three times daily, elevate leg, return if red or hot

hpi.text: front of knee below kneecap, started yesterday after gardening, a little bit of swelling
hpi.evidence_span:
front of knee, below the kneecap
HCP: how long
Patient: started yesterday after gardening
HCP: any swelling
Patient: a little bit

exam.text: extension feels tight, flexion okay, no locking
exam.evidence_span:
extension feels tight
HCP: flexion okay, no locking

problems.name: prepatellar bursitis or early effusion
problems.evidence_span: likely prepatellar bursitis or early effusion
